messages.content:
Wen-Yih thinks that his sewing staff may be working inefficiently. Based on Taylor’s scientific management principles, all of the following recommendations would be appropriate, except


Group of answer choices

a. use a piece-rate pay system.


b. develop specialized equipment for the workers.


c. conduct a time-and-motion study.


d. offer more intrinsic rewards.
d. offer more intrinsic rewards.

In the original Hawthorne studies, Western Electric engineers found that

Group of answer choices

a. decreased lighting improved performance.


b. increased lighting improved performance.


c. lighting had no effect on performance.


d. increased lighting and decreased lighting both improved performance.
b. increased lighting improved performance.

While classical motivation theory focused on __________, human relations theory focused on __________.


Group of answer choices

a. Maslow’s hierarchy; Frederick Taylor’s work


b. economic needs; the work environment


c. intrinsic rewards; extrinsic rewards


d. satisfaction; productivity
b. economic needs; the work environment.

Video game company designers and programmers are probably best described as


Group of answer choices

a. top managers.


b. human resources management specialists.


c. human resources management generalists.


d. knowledge workers.
d. knowledge workers.

Job analysis consists of


Group of answer choices

a. a specification and an evaluation.


b. a description and a plan.


c. a plan and an evaluation.


d. a specification and a description.
d. a specification and a description.

__________ is the process of attracting qualified job applicants, while __________ is the process of choosing the best applicant for a particular job.


Group of answer choices

a. Selection; training


b. Recruiting; selection


c. Planning; forecasting


d. Forecasting; recruiting
b. Recruiting; selection.

After three years as a management consulting associate, Fawn was promoted to consulting manager. This is an example of


Group of answer choices

a. internal recruiting.


b. human resources planning.


c. a replacement chart.


d. external recruiting.
a. internal recruiting.

On Tonio’s first day at his new management job, a human resources staff member gave him a presentation about work policies and compensation, a coworker took him on a tour of the facility, and then his new boss ate lunch with him and introduced him to many of the other managers. This process is known as

Group of answer choices

a. hiring.


b. job analysis.


c. selection.


d. orientation.
d. orientation.

DuPont Corporation has had the following slogan on its website: “Better things for better living through Chemistry.” The site has gone on to say, “Our vision is to be the world’s most dynamic science company, creating sustainable solutions essential to a better, safer and healthier life for people everywhere.” This is an example of DuPont’s


Group of answer choices

a. environmental analysis.


b. strategic goal.


c. organizational analysis.


d. mission statement.
d. mission statement.

A depth chart, also called a replacement chart, is one tool that is very helpful in


Group of answer choices

a. strategic planning.


b. succession planning.


c. tactical planning.


d. innovation planning.
b. succession planning.

After blackouts in much of the northeastern U.S. a few years ago many businesses developed a plan for how to handle a power crisis more effectively in the future. This type of plan is called a


Group of answer choices

a. strategic plan.


b. crisis plan.


c. tactical plan.


d. innovation plan.
b. crisis plan.

A corporation’s financial managers have responsibility for preparing financial statements, monitoring costs, and overseeing the company’s investments.



Group of answer choices

True

False
True
